basic_details.job_title: ICMR Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Section Officer / Assistant Posts
basic_details.short_information: Indian Council of Medical Research (ICMR) Section Officer / Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of ICMR. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the ICMR Section Officer / Assistant Recruitment 2026.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICMR Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ICMR Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ICMR Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ICMR Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for ICMR Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICMR Section Officer / Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the ICMR Section Officer / Assistant posts is 15th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Section Officer / Assistant posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Section Officer and Assistant positions by the Indian Council of Medical Research.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this ICMR recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their filled application forms to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the job type for these ICMR vacancies?
faq.answer: The job type for these vacancies is Deputation, meaning candidates will be appointed on deputation from their parent department.

faq.question: Q5. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this ICMR recruitment is 16/12/2023-Admn.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for ICMR Section Officer / Assistant posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the ICMR office located for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The ICMR office for this recruitment is located in Belagavi, Karnataka, with the pincode 590010.

faq.question: Q8. When was the notification released?
faq.answer: The official notification for this recruitment was released on 03rd July 2026.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from any state apply for this ICMR recruitment?
faq.answer: While the office is in Karnataka, the notification does not specify state-wise restrictions for deputation. However, eligibility for deputation typically depends on service rules of the parent organization.

faq.question: Q10. What is the salary structure for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The salary details for the Section Officer and Assistant posts are not explicitly mentioned in the provided data. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for specific salary information.
